description: This component creates a force field that allows the setting of or applying force to the velocity of Character Controllers.

fields.TriggersOnly: Whether to only allow trigger colliders attached to character controller objects to activate the force field.
fields.Force: force direction and magnitude to apply a character controller within range with.
fields.ForceMode: Whether to use impulse, apply, or set velocity using ``Force``
fields.ForceSpace: Whether to do the force direction in local or global space (so should ``Force`` be scaled and rotated by the slot this is on or not?)
fields.RadialForceRadius: The range of effect this force field has.
fields.ForceSlotSpace: Override the transform space for ``Force`` with this if set.
fields.MinActivationVelocity: The minimum velocity a character controller has to be going to trigger this force field.
fields.MaxForceVelocity: How fast the character controller's velocity can be at max after being affected by this component when the user isn't holding Jump
fields.HoldJumpMaxForceVelocity: How fast the character controller's velocity can be at max after being affected by this component when the user is holding Jump
fields.PreseveDirectionAcrossPlane: Calculates a plane that is perpendicular to the vector ``Force`` (like a stick stuck into a piece of paper) and maintains the initial direction of the velocity of the character controller in either the forward or backwards facing direction of this plane.
fields.IgnoreParentUser: Whether to ignore the active user when finding character controllers within range of ``RadialForceRadius``. This does not ignore character controllers that are simulated by the user.
fields.NoJumpMultiplier: How much to multiply the effect of ``Force`` when the user isn't holding Jump
fields.HoldJumpMultiplier: How much to multiply the effect of ``Force`` when the user is holding Jump
fields.MaxCharacterVelocity: The maximum velocity this component can set a character controller's speed to after setting a force on it.
fields.MinCharacterVelocity: The minimum velocity this component can set a character controller's speed to after setting a force on it.
fields.CharacterVelocityDampeningSpeed: How fast to slow the user down. this can be used to give the effect of jumping into molasses.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: Needs a collider on the same hierarchy to allow triggering this component.
